entries.name: cTornado
entries.description: Fixed-denomination cToken-based mixer pool. Anyone can sweep accrued COMP rewards, but the claimed COMP is always sent to the governance address.

denomination.description: Fixed cToken amount accepted by this pool.

token.description: cToken accepted by this mixer instance.

verifier.description: zkSNARK verifier used to authorize withdrawals from the pool.

hasher.description: Merkle-tree hasher used for commitments and root updates.

comp.description: COMP token accrued by the cToken position and claimable to governance.

governance.description: Recipient of claimed COMP rewards from this pool.

entries.name: ERC20Tornado
entries.description: Fixed-denomination ERC20 mixer pool from the newer Tornado Cash pool generation. Funds are governed by the withdrawal verifier and the immutable verifier/hasher pair configured at deployment.

denomination.description: Fixed deposit amount accepted by this pool.

token.description: ERC20 token accepted by this mixer instance.

verifier.description: zkSNARK verifier used to authorize withdrawals from the pool.

hasher.description: Merkle-tree hasher used for commitments and root updates.

entries.name: TornadoCash_erc20
entries.description: Legacy fixed-denomination ERC20 mixer from the original Tornado Cash pool generation. It retains an operator role that can replace the withdrawal verifier until renounced.

denomination.description: Fixed token amount accepted by this pool.

operator.description: Legacy operator role retained from the trusted-setup phase.

token.description: ERC20 token accepted by this mixer instance.

verifier.description: zkSNARK verifier used to authorize withdrawals from the pool.

entries.name: WithdrawVerifier
entries.description: Verifier contract for Tornado anonymity-mining withdrawal proofs.

entries.name: TornadoCash_Eth_01
entries.description: Legacy fixed-denomination ETH mixer for 0.1 ETH deposits. This older pool generation keeps an operator role that can replace the withdrawal verifier and, for this instance, perform a one-time state migration.

denomination.description: Fixed ETH amount accepted by this pool.

operator.description: Legacy operator role retained from the trusted-setup phase.

verifier.description: zkSNARK verifier used to authorize withdrawals from the pool.

isMigrated.description: Whether the one-time legacy state migration path has already been used.

entries.name: cTornado
entries.description: Fixed-denomination cToken-based mixer pool. Anyone can sweep accrued COMP rewards, but the claimed COMP is always sent to the governance address.

denomination.description: Fixed cToken amount accepted by this pool.

token.description: cToken accepted by this mixer instance.

verifier.description: zkSNARK verifier used to authorize withdrawals from the pool.

comp.description: COMP token accrued by the cToken position and claimable to governance.

governance.description: Recipient of claimed COMP rewards from this pool.

entries.name: TornadoVault
entries.description: Vault that escrows locked TORN on behalf of governance users and serves withdrawals initiated by the governance contract.

entries.name: TornadoTreesV1
entries.description: Legacy Tornado Trees contract that records deposit and withdrawal leaves from TornadoProxyV1 and maintains the roots later consumed by migration and mining logic.

depositTree.description: Legacy merkle tree instance storing deposit leaves.

withdrawalTree.description: Legacy merkle tree instance storing withdrawal leaves.

hasher.description: Hasher used by the legacy deposit and withdrawal trees.

tornadoProxy.description: Only this proxy is allowed to register deposits and withdrawals into the legacy trees.

entries.name: Proposal
entries.description: One-off governance proposal payload that deployed the newer Tornado Trees and proxy wiring, migrated legacy tree state, and disabled old mineable instances on the legacy proxy.

getInstances.description: List of pool instances and their target enabled/disabled state used during the migration.

getSearchParams.description: Search parameters used to reconstruct the lengths of the legacy deposit and withdrawal arrays during migration.

miner.description: Miner contract rewired to the newly deployed Tornado Trees.

tornadoProxyV1.description: Legacy proxy that this proposal disables selected old mineable instances on.

tornadoTreesV1.description: Legacy tree manager whose state is imported into the new tree contract.

verifier.description: Batch tree update verifier passed into the newly deployed Tornado Trees contract.

entries.name: TornadoTreesV2
entries.description: Upgradeable batch-based Tornado Trees contract that reuses legacy tree state, queues new leaves from the newer proxy, and accepts batched root updates proven by a verifier.

$admin.description: Can upgrade the Tornado Trees implementation.

governance.description: Governance address controlling the upgraded tree manager.

tornadoProxy.description: Only this proxy is allowed to enqueue deposit and withdrawal leaves into the upgraded trees.

tornadoTreesV1.description: Legacy tree manager whose historical leaves and roots are reused during migration.

treeUpdateVerifier.description: Verifier used to prove batched deposit and withdrawal tree updates.

entries.name: RelayerRegistry
entries.description: Upgradeable registry that tracks registered relayers, their worker addresses, and their staked TORN balances used to service withdrawals.

$admin.description: Can upgrade the relayer registry implementation.

governance.description: Governance address controlling relayer system parameters.

ens.description: ENS registry used to verify ownership of relayer names during registration.

feeManager.description: Fee manager used to determine how much relayer stake is burned per withdrawal.

minStakeAmount.description: Minimum TORN stake required for relayer registration.

staking.description: Staking contract that escrows relayer stake and receives burned-stake rewards.

torn.description: TORN token used as relayer stake collateral.

tornadoRouter.description: Only this router is allowed to burn relayer stake during withdrawals.

entries.name: TornadoStakingRewards
entries.description: Upgradeable staking rewards contract that holds relayer stake, distributes burn-derived rewards to locked TORN holders, and lets governance recover TORN from the contract.

$admin.description: Can upgrade the staking rewards implementation.

Governance.description: Governance contract controlling staking reward accounting and token recovery.

relayerRegistry.description: Relayer registry that is also authorized to add burn-derived rewards into the staking system.

torn.description: TORN token held as relayer stake and distributed as staking rewards.

accumulatedRewardPerTorn.description: Global reward-per-TORN accumulator used to distribute burned relayer stake.

ratioConstant.description: Scaling factor based on total TORN supply used in reward calculations.

entries.name: RewardSwap
entries.description: Liquidity schedule that pays out TORN rewards for anonymity mining. Only the Miner contract can draw from it or adjust the reward weight.

miner.description: Only this contract can distribute TORN rewards from the swap pool and adjust the pool weight.

torn.description: TORN token dispensed as mining rewards.

poolWeight.description: Weight parameter controlling how many TORN rewards are distributed through the swap curve.

initialLiquidity.description: Virtual TORN liquidity available at the start of the reward schedule.

liquidity.description: Maximum additional TORN liquidity that linearly unlocks over the reward schedule.

DURATION.description: Length of the linear reward-unlock schedule.

entries.name: GovernanceProposalStateUpgrade
entries.description: Upgradeable Tornado Cash governance contract that manages proposals, voting, execution, and treasury-connected governance modules. If you trust this contract, you trust its upgrade path and proposal rules to change protocol governance behavior.

receivedPermissions.description: replace the proxy allowed to enqueue deposit and withdrawal leaves.
replace the verifier used for batched tree updates.
change the router address allowed to burn relayer stake during withdrawals.
nullify a registered relayer's staked balance.
set the minimum TORN stake required to become a relayer.
update user reward accounting when locked balances change.
withdraw TORN held by the staking rewards contract.
change how long cached per-instance fees remain valid before they must be recomputed.
change the TWAP lookback period used to price Tornado instances.
change the Uniswap fee tier used for the TORN price source.
add or update supported pool instances.
replace the connected Tornado Trees contract.
rescue tokens sent to the proxy.
change the reward-swap pool weight used when distributing TORN rewards.
replace the connected Tornado Trees contract.
replace the reward, withdrawal, and tree-update verifiers.
set mining reward rates.
manage the allowlist of addresses that can transfer while TORN is paused.
pause or unpause TORN transfers after the initial pause period expires.
rescue arbitrary tokens held by the TORN contract.
enable or disable supported pool instances.
rescue tokens sent to the proxy.
add or update supported Tornado instances and their enabled/disabled state.
change the router contract allowed to interact with registered instances.
remove supported instances from the registry.
set per-instance protocol fees charged to relayers.
rescue tokens sent to the router.
upgrade the Tornado Trees implementation, changing how deposit and withdrawal roots are maintained.
upgrade the relayer registry implementation, changing relayer registration and slashing logic.
upgrade the staking rewards implementation, changing custody and reward-accounting logic for relayer stake.
upgrade the governance implementation, changing proposal execution and treasury-control logic.
upgrade the fee manager implementation, changing how relayer burn fees are computed.
upgrade the registry implementation, changing how supported pool instances are tracked.

EXECUTION_DELAY.description: Delay between a proposal succeeding and becoming executable.

EXECUTION_EXPIRATION.description: Window after the execution delay during which a successful proposal can still be executed.

QUORUM_VOTES.description: Minimum combined votes required for a proposal to reach quorum.

PROPOSAL_THRESHOLD.description: Minimum voting power required to create a proposal.

VOTING_DELAY.description: Delay between proposal creation and the start of voting.

VOTING_PERIOD.description: Length of the voting window for proposals.

CLOSING_PERIOD.description: Additional period used while closing proposals in the patched governance logic.

VOTE_EXTEND_TIME.description: Extra lock time applied to voting positions around proposal participation.

gasCompensationVault.description: Vault that funds gas reimbursements for governance actions.

returnMultisigAddress.description: Multisig hardcoded into the upgrade path for specific return flows in governance.

Staking.description: Staking rewards contract notified when governance lock balances change.

torn.description: Governance token used for proposal creation, voting, and locking.

userVault.description: Vault that escrows users' locked TORN and serves governance withdrawals.

entries.name: FeeManager
entries.description: Upgradeable fee manager that derives relayer burn fees for each Tornado instance from registry settings and Uniswap TWAP data.

$admin.description: Can upgrade the fee manager implementation.

registry.description: Instance registry whose per-pool settings are used to derive relayer burn fees.

feeDeviations.description: Per-instance deviation between currently cached fees and freshly computed market fees.

PROTOCOL_FEE_DIVIDER.description: Divider used when converting per-instance protocol fee percentages into relayer burn fees.

uniswapTimePeriod.description: TWAP lookback period used when pricing TORN against pool assets.

uniswapTornPoolSwappingFee.description: Uniswap V3 fee tier used for the TORN price oracle path.

updateFeeTimeLimit.description: Maximum age of cached instance fees before they are recomputed on use.

entries.name: ERC20Tornado
entries.description: Fixed-denomination ERC20 mixer pool from the newer Tornado Cash pool generation. Funds are governed by the withdrawal verifier and the immutable verifier/hasher pair configured at deployment.

denomination.description: Fixed deposit amount accepted by this pool.

token.description: ERC20 token accepted by this mixer instance.

verifier.description: zkSNARK verifier used to authorize withdrawals from the pool.

hasher.description: Merkle-tree hasher used for commitments and root updates.

entries.name: DepositTree
entries.description: Unverified merkle tree instance that stores legacy Tornado deposit leaves for TornadoTreesV1.

entries.name: TreeUpdateVerifier
entries.description: Verifier contract for Tornado mining account-tree update proofs.

entries.name: TornadoProxyV2
entries.description: Newer immutable Tornado proxy that routes deposits and withdrawals to supported pool instances and records them in the upgraded Tornado Trees contract.

governance.description: Governance address controlling the newer proxy.

tornadoTrees.description: Upgraded tree manager that records deposits and withdrawals from this proxy.

entries.name: Miner
entries.description: Mining and reward-distribution contract for Tornado anonymity mining. It verifies reward and withdrawal proofs, maintains account roots, and routes TORN rewards through the swap contract.

governance.description: Governance address controlling reward parameters and verifier wiring.

rewardSwap.description: Reward swap contract that dispenses TORN rewards earned through anonymity mining.

withdrawVerifier.description: Verifier used for mining withdrawal proofs.

treeUpdateVerifier.description: Verifier used for account tree update proofs.

tornadoTrees.description: Tornado Trees contract whose deposit and withdrawal roots are consumed by mining proofs.

entries.name: TORN
entries.description: TORN governance token contract. Transfers start paused and can later be toggled by governance, which also controls the paused-transfer allowlist and token rescue functions.

paused.description: Whether ordinary TORN transfers are currently paused.

canUnpauseAfter.description: Earliest timestamp after which governance may change the paused state.

entries.name: MiMCHasher
entries.description: Unverified MiMC hasher used by newer Tornado pool generations for commitment-tree operations.

entries.name: RewardVerifier
entries.description: Verifier contract for Tornado anonymity-mining reward proofs.

entries.name: TornadoProxyV1
entries.description: Legacy immutable Tornado proxy that routes deposits and withdrawals to pool instances and records them in the legacy Tornado Trees contract.

governance.description: Governance address controlling the legacy proxy.

tornadoTrees.description: Legacy tree manager that records deposits and withdrawals from this proxy.
